ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled_tuned<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Response is relevant and consistent with persona but could be more natural in tone to convey urgency without breaking character.

Baseline No Context: I'm sorry, but entry to the Royal Archive requires formal clearance and appointment scheduling due to its sensitive nature.<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Short note - Lacks context relevance; persona is somewhat consistent with a strict guardian.

The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency as a strict Gatekeeper would not allow unsolicited entry without proper clearance and reason, sounds natural in the dialogue flow of an NPC guarded by suspicion towards strangers. The overall quality could be improved with slight enhancement to make it more engaging or provide additional context for urgency if needed.
